chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Const. Petition No. D- 1046 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case. 1.For hearing on office objection ‘A’ 2.For hearing of M.A No.1279/2025 (S/A) 3.For Hearing of main case. 22.10.2025. Mr. Abdul Waheed Khushk Advocate for the petitioners a/w petitioners Mr. Aftab Naik Muhammad Bhutto, Asstt: AG, Mr.Sardar Ali Solangi, DPG for the State a/w ASI Amjad AliJunejo, I/c SHO PS Sachal and SIP/IO Raza Muhammad Soomro, CP Naseem Nagar, PS Qasimabad, Hyderabad. -------- Through the instant petition, the Petitioners have sought the following reliefs: a) That, this Honourable Court may be pleased to pass order for quash FIR registered Crime No.479/2025 U/S 365-B, 496-A at CP Naseem Nagar PS Qasimabad, or direct the I.O record the statement of petitioner No.1 and disposed of the FIR crime No.479/2025 CP Naseem Nagar PS Qasimabad, according with law. b) That, this honourable court may be pleased to direct the official respondents to provide protection to the petitioners and his family members, as per law. c) That, this honourable court may be pleased to direct the private respondents to submit their PR bond before this honourable Court. Pursuant to notice, Respondents No. 2 to 6 have filed their respective statements, which are taken on record. Copies thereof have been provided to learned counsel for the Petitioners. Respondent No.7 Mst.Haleema, mother of Petitioner No.1, has appeared and submitted that following the demise of Abdul Jabbar, the first husband of Petitioner No.1, she was married to Majid Ali Junejo. She further states that Petitioner No.1 subsequently left her parental home of her own volition and contracted marriage with Naimatullah, thereby performing nikah over nikah.

Respondent No.7 Mst.Haleema, mother of Petitioner No.1, has appeared and submitted that following the demise of Abdul Jabbar, the first husband of Petitioner No.1, she was married to Majid Ali Junejo. She further states that Petitioner No.1 subsequently left her parental home of her own volition and contracted marriage with Naimatullah, thereby performing nikah over nikah. The Nikahnama was shown to her and returned. 2 This matter was taken up earlier during court hours when the investigating officer at Police Station Qasimabad, Hyderabad, was directed to record Petitioner Mst.Reema's statement. The Investigating Officer has now recorded her statement, wherein she has categorically denied the allegations levelled by her mother, Mst. Haleema and affirmed that she contracted marriage with Petitioner No.2 of her own free will. In view of the above, this petition stands disposed of with the directions to the Investigating Officer, Respondent No.3, to furnish a report before the concerned Court in light of the statement of Petitioner No.1, strictly in accordance with law. The official respondents are directed to provide legal protection to the Petitioners, as and when required, in accordance with law. Judge Judge Abid H. Qazi/**
